mapper.select: SELECT A.SEQNO, A.OFFCL_ITM_CTGRY, B.CD_NM AS OFFCL_ITM_CTGRY_NM, A.TITLE, CAST(A.W_DATE AS VARCHAR(10)) AS W_DATE FROM MA30_BBS_NOTICE_MGT A INNER JOIN SUB_CD B ON A.OFFCL_ITM_CTGRY = B.CMMN_CD||B.SUB_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SEQNO, CTGRY_CD FROM ( SELECT SEQNO, REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','') AS CTGRY_CD, NVL(LENGTH(CTGRY_CD)-LENGTH(REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','')),0)+1 AS CNT FROM MA30_BBS_CTGRY_MGT WHERE BBS_MK_CD='BBS001' )C ) C ON A.SEQNO = C.SEQNO WHERE LOCTN_CD= #{loctnCd} AND D_FLAG='Z00001' AND C.CTGRY_CD LIKE '%'||#{ctgryCd}||'%' AND APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND B.CMMN_CD = 'Z02' AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(S_DATE,'-',''), S_TIME) <= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24')) AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(E_DATE,'-',''), E_TIME) >= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24')) AND UPPER(TITLE) LIKE UPPER('%'||#{searchWord}||'%') ORDER BY A.SEQNO DESC WITH UR

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM MA30_BBS_NOTICE_MGT A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SEQNO, CTGRY_CD FROM ( SELECT SEQNO, REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','') AS CTGRY_CD, NVL(LENGTH(CTGRY_CD)-LENGTH(REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','')),0)+1 AS CNT FROM MA30_BBS_CTGRY_MGT WHERE BBS_MK_CD='BBS001' )C ) C ON A.SEQNO = C.SEQNO WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOCTN_CD = #{language} AND C.CTGRY_CD LIKE '%'||#{ctgry_cd}||'%' AND A.D_FLAG = 'Z00001' AND A.APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(A.S_DATE,'-',''), A.S_TIME) <= CONCAT(REPLACE(CURRENT DATE, '-',''), HOUR(CURRENT TIME))) AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(A.E_DATE,'-',''), A.E_TIME) >= CONCAT(REPLACE(CURRENT DATE, '-',''), HOUR(CURRENT TIME))) WITH UR

SELECT A.SEQNO , VARCHAR_FORMAT(A.W_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS W_DATE , A.TITLE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FXD_BULLTN_FLG DESC, A.W_DATE DESC) RN , A.FXD_BULLTN_FLG FROM MA30_BBS_NOTICE_MGT A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SEQNO, CTGRY_CD FROM ( SELECT SEQNO, REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','') AS CTGRY_CD, NVL(LENGTH(CTGRY_CD)-LENGTH(REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','')),0)+1 AS CNT FROM MA30_BBS_CTGRY_MGT WHERE BBS_MK_CD='BBS001' )C ) C ON A.SEQNO = C.SEQNO WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOCTN_CD = #{language} AND C.CTGRY_CD LIKE '%'||#{ctgry_cd}||'%' AND A.D_FLAG = 'Z00001' AND A.APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(A.S_DATE,'-',''), A.S_TIME) <= CONCAT(REPLACE(CURRENT DATE, '-',''), HOUR(CURRENT TIME))) AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(A.E_DATE,'-',''), A.E_TIME) >= CONCAT(REPLACE(CURRENT DATE, '-',''), HOUR(CURRENT TIME)))
WITH UR

SELECT A.SEQNO , A.TITLE , A.CONTENTS , VARCHAR_FORMAT(A.W_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS W_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FXD_BULLTN_FLG DESC, A.W_DATE DESC) RN , A.FXD_BULLTN_FLG FROM MA30_BBS_NOTICE_MGT A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SEQNO, CTGRY_CD FROM ( SELECT SEQNO, REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','') AS CTGRY_CD, NVL(LENGTH(CTGRY_CD)-LENGTH(REPLACE(CTGRY_CD,'|','')),0)+1 AS CNT FROM MA30_BBS_CTGRY_MGT WHERE BBS_MK_CD='BBS001' )C ) C ON A.SEQNO = C.SEQNO WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOCTN_CD = #{language} AND C.CTGRY_CD LIKE '%'||#{ctgry_cd}||'%' AND A.D_FLAG = 'Z00001' AND A.APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(A.S_DATE,'-',''), A.S_TIME) <= CONCAT(REPLACE(CURRENT DATE, '-',''), HOUR(CURRENT TIME))) AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(A.E_DATE,'-',''), A.E_TIME) >= CONCAT(REPLACE(CURRENT DATE, '-',''), HOUR(CURRENT TIME))) WITH UR
